title: The Hybrid Blanket Pattern
hero: Combine hand and machine knitting for a beautiful blanket
description: The Hybrid Blanket Pattern helps you create a stunning blanket that combines the warmth of hand-knit garter borders with the speed of machine-knit stockinette. Enter your size, gauge, and border preferences, and the wizard calculates stitch counts for both techniques.
excerpt: Combine hand and machine knitting for a cozy blanket with garter borders.
imageAlt: Hand and machine knit hybrid blanket
metaTitle: Hybrid Blanket Pattern | Hand + Machine Knit Blanket
metaDescription: Create a cozy blanket combining hand-knit garter borders with machine-knit stockinette. Calculate stitch counts for both techniques.

schemaMarkup.name: Hybrid Blanket Pattern
schemaMarkup.description: Interactive pattern for creating blankets with hand-knit garter borders and machine-knit bodies.
